panels.title: Total Platform Logs
Platform Errors

queries.query: SELECT count(_timestamp) AS value FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(severity,'')) = 'error' OR coalesce(error,'') <> '' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%failed%'

panels.title: Namespaces

queries.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT kubernetes_namespace_name) AS value FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Pods

queries.query: SELECT count(DISTINCT kubernetes_pod_name) AS value FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Platform Logs Over Time

queries.query: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS bucket, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_platform" GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

panels.title: Platform Errors Over Time

queries.query: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS bucket, count(_timestamp) AS errors FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(severity,'')) = 'error' OR coalesce(error,'') <> '' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%exception%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%panic%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%failed%' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

panels.title: Top Platform Namespaces

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_namespace_name AS namespace, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY namespace ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Platform Pods

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_pod_name AS pod, count(_timestamp) AS logs FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pod ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Erroring Nodes

queries.query: SELECT coalesce(nodename, kubernetes_host) AS node, count(_timestamp) AS errors FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE coalesce(nodename, kubernetes_host) IS NOT NULL AND (lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(severity,'')) = 'error' OR coalesce(error,'') <> '' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%failed%') GROUP BY node ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Reasons

queries.query: SELECT reason, count(_timestamp) AS total FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reason ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top Subsystems by Errors

queries.query: SELECT subsys, count(_timestamp) AS errors FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE subsys IS NOT NULL AND (lower(coalesce(level,'')) = 'error' OR lower(coalesce(severity,'')) = 'error' OR coalesce(error,'') <> '' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%error%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%failed%') GROUP BY subsys ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Logging Pipeline Issues

queries.query: SELECT kubernetes_pod_name AS pod, count(_timestamp) AS issues FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE kubernetes_namespace_name = 'logging' AND kubernetes_pod_name IS NOT NULL AND (lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%retry%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%retry%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%retry%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%failed%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%dropped%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%dropped%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%dropped%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%cannot%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%cannot%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%cannot%') GROUP BY pod ORDER BY issues DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: DNS / Network Issues

queries.query: SELECT coalesce(kubernetes_pod_name, module, subsys) AS target, count(_timestamp) AS issues FROM "k8s_platform" WHERE coalesce(kubernetes_pod_name, module, subsys) IS NOT NULL AND (lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%i/o timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%i/o timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%i/o timeout%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%no route to host%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%no route to host%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%no route to host%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%servfail%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%servfail%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%servfail%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%nxdomain%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%nxdomain%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%nxdomain%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%connection refused%' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%connection refused%' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%connection refused%' OR lower(coalesce(message,'')) LIKE '%lookup %' OR lower(coalesce(msg,'')) LIKE '%lookup %' OR lower(coalesce(log,'')) LIKE '%lookup %') GROUP BY target ORDER BY issues DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Latest Platform Errors

queries.query:
SELECT 
  _timestamp,
  kubernetes_namespace_name,
  kubernetes_pod_name,
  kubernetes_container_name,
  coalesce(error, message, msg, log) AS error_message
FROM "k8s_platform"
WHERE 
   kubernetes_namespace_name not like 'logging'
   AND (

      lower(coalesce(level, '')) = 'error'
  OR lower(coalesce(severity, '')) = 'error'
  OR coalesce(error, '') <> ''
  
  -- Real error keywords (more targeted)
  OR lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%exception%'
  OR lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%panic%'
  OR lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%error%' AND NOT lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%http/1.1%'
  OR lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%failed%' AND NOT lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%http/1.1%'
  
  -- Optional: catch real 4xx/5xx if status field exists
  OR (status IS NOT NULL AND status >= 400)
  -- Extra protection: explicitly exclude nginx/proxy access logs
  AND NOT lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '% 200 %'
  AND NOT lower(coalesce(message, msg, log, '')) LIKE '%"GET %'
   )

ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100
